description_long: This is a partially melted, off-white candle with a visible flame at the top and a blackened wick. The candle is thick and cylindrical, with a wide, irregular base formed by melted wax pooling outward. Multiple wax drips run down the sides, giving it a well-used, organic appearance. The surface is matte and slightly rough, with subtle discoloration and shading that enhance its realistic look. There is no external holder or candlestick; the candle stands on its own wax base, which is uneven and spread out. The flame is small but distinct, with a blue core and yellow tip, indicating it is currently burning.
description: A partially melted, off-white candle with a visible flame, wax drips, and a wide, irregular wax base. The candle stands on its own without a holder.
description_view_0: This view shows the candle's front with prominent wax drips and a clear view of the flame and wick, as well as the uneven, spread-out wax base.
description_view_1: This side view highlights a large wax drip running down the candle and the irregular, organic shape of the wax base.
description_view_2: This rear view displays the back of the candle with fewer wax drips and a symmetrical look at the melted base.
description_view_3: This angle shows another side with a distinct wax drip and the wide, uneven wax base extending outward.
